key.name: daemon-url
key.description: Base URL of the usage-daemon that owns polling for every provider. Localhost only unless you know what you're doing.

key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often the extension re-reads the daemon snapshots. The daemon does the real (slower) polling; this is a cheap local read.

key.name: rotate-interval
key.description: How often the panel switches which provider's bars it is showing. The popup always shows every provider regardless of this setting.

key.name: show-provider-tag
key.summary: Show the active provider's name in the panel

key.name: provider-alias
key.description: Optional user-chosen name shown in the panel instead of the daemon's own provider label. Keyed by provider id.

key.name: provider-subtitle
key.summary: Per-provider subtitle shown beside the display name
key.description: Optional short text (e.g. "API") shown next to the provider name in the panel, side by side on the same line. Keyed by provider id.

key.name: show-bar-labels
key.summary: Show the letter before each bar

key.name: show-panel-bar
key.description: Global column toggle: whether the progress bar is drawn for every window on the active provider's row(s). Independent of the percent text.

key.name: show-panel-percent
key.description: Global column toggle: whether the percentage text is drawn for every window on the active provider's row(s). Independent of the bar.

key.name: stack-panel-bars
key.summary: Stack the active provider's bars vertically instead of side by side

key.name: warn-on-projected-depletion
key.summary: Flash the panel logo when the daemon projects a window to deplete before reset
